overview: WE ARE ONE is a vibrant Tomorrowland-inspired festival website showcasing 12 global EDM and family festivals. Features a polished public-facing site with festival info, news, lineups, donations, sponsors, and pre/post-festival events, plus a full admin dashboard for managing all content with database persistence.
features: 12 pre-loaded global festivals (EDM, Family, Rave, Nightclub)
Public Donations page with global and per-festival fundraising goals
Sponsors showcase on main page and individual festival pages
Admin dashboard with full CRUD for all content
Permanent deletion of all admin content
All data persisted to backend database
Vibrant Tomorrowland-inspired design with LED animations
